2606.24359.title: Automatic Part-of-Speech Tagging of Arabic-English Dictionary Senses through WordNet
2606.24359.paper_summary: This paper proposed an algorithm for part-of-speech (POS) tagging senses of a bilingual dictionary. The algorithm is applied on the Al-Mawrid Arabic-English dictionary. The tagging task is accomplished by transferring the POS tags of the English translation equivalences (TEs) to the dictionary senses after dis-ambiguities process. The English POS tags of senses are acquired from the Princeton WordNet. POS tagging of bilingual dictionary senses is prerequisite to link a bilingual dictionary to WordNet and/or standardizing that dictionary into WordNet-LMF format where the synset (set of synonyms), not word, is the basic brick. The registered accuracy is high though the cost is little. Building NLP/HLT tools needs linguistic experts, large investments, and long time. For statistical approach, we need large annotated corpora and for rule-based approach, we need large lexicon that contains rich linguistic and world knowledge. That motivates the appearance of what are called resource-light approaches to develop natural language processing (NLP) tools for poor-resource languages.
2606.24359.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文提出了一種用於雙語字典詞性標註的算法。該算法應用於Al-Mawrid阿拉伯語-英語字典。標註任務是通過在消歧過程後將英語翻譯對應詞（TEs）的詞性標籤轉移到字典詞義上來完成的。詞義的英語詞性標籤來自於普林斯頓詞網（Princeton WordNet）。雙語字典詞義的詞性標註是將雙語字典與詞網連接和/或將該字典標準化為詞網-LMF格式的前提，其中同義詞集（同義詞的集合），而不是單詞，是基本單位。雖然註冊的準確性很高，但成本卻很低。構建自然語言處理（NLP）/人類語言技術（HLT）工具需要語言學專家、大量投資和長時間。對於統計方法，我們需要大量的標註語料庫；而對於基於規則的方法，我們需要包含豐富語言和世界知識的大型詞典。這促使了所謂的資源輕量方法的出現，以開發針對資源貧乏語言的自然語言處理（NLP）工具。
2606.24359.author: Diaa M. Fayed et.al.
2606.24359.authors: Diaa M. Fayed, Aly A. Fahmy, Mohsen A. Rashwan, Wafaa K. Fayed
